allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\('summary',''\)\); print\('Severity:', d.get\('severity',''\)\); vs=[v for v in d.get\('vulnerabilities',[]\)]; [print\('Fixed in:', v.get\('patched_versions',''\)\) for v in vs]")
Bash(find . -type d \\\( -name "obj" -o -name "bin" \\\) -not -path "./.git/*" -exec rm -rf {} + dotnet build OrderDeck.sln)

Bash(find Extension OrderDeck.Overlay/wwwroot -type f \\\( -name "*.html" -o -name "*.css" -o -name "*.js" \\\) -exec sed -i 's/LiveDeck/OrderDeck/g; s/livedeck/orderdeck/g' {} \\; echo "DONE" grep -rln "LiveDeck\\|livedeck" Extension/ OrderDeck.Overlay/wwwroot/)
Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@72.62.53.86 'echo CONNECTED && uname -a && lsb_release -a 2>/dev/null && uptime')
Bash(head -20 echo "---" ls OrderDeck.LicenseServer/*.cs OrderDeck.LicenseServer/*.json OrderDeck.LicenseServer/Dockerfile OrderDeck.LicenseServer/*.yml)
Bash(cd /c/Users/burak/source/repos/LiveDeck ls OrderDeck.LicenseServer/Pages/Admin/ echo "---" find OrderDeck.LicenseServer/Pages/Admin -name "*.cshtml" -not -name "*.cs")

Bash(cd /c/Users/burak/source/repos/LiveDeck echo "=== SKU model fields \(form alanları\) ===" grep -E "public.*get.*set|\\[Required\\]|\\[StringLength" OrderDeck.LicenseServer/Domain/Sku.cs echo "---" echo "=== Issue License form fields ===" grep -E "asp-for|Required|InputText" OrderDeck.LicenseServer/Pages/Admin/Licenses/Issue.cshtml)

Bash(cd /c/Users/burak/source/repos/LiveDeck echo "=== Email trigger points \(which actions send mail\) ===" grep -rln "AdminActionEmailService\\|EmailService\\|SendAsync\\|SendMailAsync\\|SmtpClient" --include="*.cs" OrderDeck.LicenseServer/)
Bash(cd /c/Users/burak/source/repos/LiveDeck echo "=== Customer create endpoints ===" grep -rn "HttpPost\\|HttpPut" --include="*.cs" OrderDeck.LicenseServer/Controllers/)
Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 root@72.62.53.86 'docker logs orderdeck-license --tail 30 2>&1 | grep -iE "email|smtp|brevo|send|warn|error|confirmation" | tail -20')
Bash(cd /c/Users/burak/source/repos/LiveDeck echo "=== SmtpEmailSender ===" ls OrderDeck.LicenseServer/Services/Email/ echo "---" cat OrderDeck.LicenseServer/Services/Email/SmtpEmailSender.cs)
Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 root@72.62.53.86 'docker logs orderdeck-license --since 1m 2>&1 | grep -iE "smtp|warn|error|send" | tail -10')
Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 root@72.62.53.86 'docker logs orderdeck-license --since 1m 2>&1 | grep -iE "smtp|warn|error" | tail -5')
Bash(cd /c/Users/burak/source/repos/LiveDeck echo "=== LoginDialog input fields ===" grep -E "asp-for|x:Name|TextBox.*Text=|PasswordBox" OrderDeck.App/Views/LoginDialog.xaml)
Bash(cd /c/Users/burak/source/repos/LiveDeck echo "=== Account-related entry points in MainShellView ===" grep -E "Hesap|Account|License|Lisans|AccountDialog" OrderDeck.App/Views/MainShellView.xaml)

Bash(cd /c/Users/burak/source/repos/LiveDeck echo "=== Local data folder size + files ===" ls -la /c/Users/burak/Documents/OrderDeck/data/ du -sh /c/Users/burak/Documents/OrderDeck/data/ echo "" echo "=== DB content estimate \(real customer load\) ===" ls -la /c/Users/burak/Documents/OrderDeck/data/orderdeck.db echo "" echo "=== VPS free disk \(where backups would live\) ===" ssh -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 root@72.62.53.86 'df -h / | tail -1' echo "" echo "=== Existing licensing API endpoints \(so backup endpoints fit pattern\) ===" grep -rn "Route\\|HttpPost\\|HttpGet" --include="*.cs" OrderDeck.LicenseServer/Controllers/)
Bash(cd /c/Users/burak/source/repos/LiveDeck echo "=== AuditLog action constants ===" grep -rn "AuditLog\\|LogAsync\\|AuditAction\\|class AuditLogger" OrderDeck.LicenseServer/Services/)

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'Get-WinEvent -LogName Application -MaxEvents 200 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.TimeCreated -gt \(Get-Date\).AddHours\(-4\) -and \($_.ProviderName -eq '\\''.NET Runtime'\\'' -or $_.ProviderName -eq '\\''Application Error'\\'' -or $_.Message -match '\\''OrderDeck'\\''\) } | Select-Object TimeCreated, ProviderName, Id, LevelDisplayName, @{N='\\''Msg'\\'';E={$_.Message.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(800,$_.Message.Length\)\)}} | Format-List')

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'Get-WinEvent -LogName Application -MaxEvents 500 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.TimeCreated -gt \(Get-Date\).AddHours\(-4\) -and \($_.ProviderName -eq '\\''Application Error'\\'' -or $_.ProviderName -eq '\\''.NET Runtime'\\''\) -and $_.Message -match '\\''OrderDeck'\\'' } | Select-Object -First 5 TimeCreated, ProviderName, Id, LevelDisplayName, @{N='\\''Msg'\\'';E={$_.Message.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(2000,$_.Message.Length\)\)}} | Format-List')

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'Get-WinEvent -LogName Application -MaxEvents 2000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.TimeCreated -gt \(Get-Date\).AddHours\(-4\) -and $_.Message -match '\\''OrderDeck.App'\\'' } | Select-Object -First 10 TimeCreated, ProviderName, Id, @{N='\\''Msg'\\'';E={$_.Message.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(3000,$_.Message.Length\)\)}} | Format-List')

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='\\''Application'\\''; ProviderName='\\''Application Error'\\''} -MaxEvents 30 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.TimeCreated -gt \(Get-Date\).AddHours\(-6\) } | Select-Object TimeCreated, Id, @{N='\\''Msg'\\'';E={$_.Message.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(1500,$_.Message.Length\)\)}} | Format-List')

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='\\''Application'\\''; ProviderName='\\''.NET Runtime'\\''; Level=2} -MaxEvents 30 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.TimeCreated -gt \(Get-Date\).AddHours\(-6\) } | Select-Object TimeCreated, Id, @{N='\\''Msg'\\'';E={$_.Message.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(2000,$_.Message.Length\)\)}} | Format-List')

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -match '\\''OrderDeck|LiveDeck'\\'' } | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, StartTime, MainWindowTitle, @{N='\\''WS_MB'\\'';E={[math]::Round\($_.WorkingSet64/1MB,1\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize')

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -match '\\''OrderDeck'\\'' } | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, MainWindowTitle, @{N='\\''HasWindow'\\'';E={$_.MainWindowHandle -ne [IntPtr]::Zero}} | Format-Table')

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-Process OrderDeck.App -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Get-Process OrderDeck.App -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table Id, ProcessName")
Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-Process -Id 7628 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, MainWindowTitle | Format-Table")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'Get-Process -Id __TRACKED_VAR__ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName | Format-Table; if \(-not \(Get-Process -Id __TRACKED_VAR__ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\)\) { Write-Host '\\''CLEAN EXIT'\\'' }')
Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'if \(Get-Process -Id __TRACKED_VAR__ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { Write-Host '\\''STILL RUNNING'\\'' } else { Write-Host '\\''CLEAN EXIT'\\'' }')
